exit_criteria: one replay-bounded transcript and signing object are specified byte for byte
generic shared-Broker deliveries prove publisher identity per accepted publish
topic, payload identity, and MQTT credentials are never sufficient authentication
valid and invalid fixtures pass every conformant binding
envelope, time, identity, digest, and ACK schemas have one authority
all language bindings report the same failure classes
TypeScript, Rust, C, and C++ execute the same fixture manifest
canonical bytes and digests are byte identical
one real Broker runs an edge harness and Cloud ingress concurrently
session resume, Runtime Manifest, and telemetry traverse application use cases
disconnect, ACK loss, process restart, duplicate delivery, digest conflict, and data-loss pass
no successful receipt is produced for a conflict or uncommitted fact
the signed ACK schema and Cloud signing transcript are frozen
successful ACK creation and outbox insertion share the production fact transaction
post-commit crash recovery republishes the identical ACK
